subject: the others

context_text: As for the Lion, he sniffed the fresh air with delight and whisked his tail from side to side in pure joy at being in the country again, while Toto ran around the others and chased the moths and butterflies, barking merrily all the time.

subject: the others

context_text: "City life does not agree with me at all," remarked the Lion, as the others walked along at a brisk pace.
normalized_context_text: "City life does not agree with me at all," remarked the Lion, as the others walked along at a brisk pace.

subject: the others

context_text: "I have lost much flesh since I lived there, and now I am anxious for a chance to show the other beasts how courageous I have grown." the others now turned and took a last look at the Emerald City.

context_text: All the others could see was a mass of towers and steeples behind the green walls, and high up above everything the spires and dome of the Palace of Oz.
